name: Molly Squidpiddge
title: Chaotic Conductor

abilities.name: U Fall in Step
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action that damaged this model, this model may move the attacking model up to 3" and the attacking model gains a Distracted token.

abilities.name: Fun Prizes
abilities.text: After this model resolves a general action, it may make a Remains marker within 3".

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Leading Baton
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3". If this action was generated by the Charge action, an ally in LoS may move up to 3" toward the target.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Parade Route
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 5". Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage and gain a Distracted token.

triggers.name: Marching in Time
triggers.text: Enemy models who failed to resist this duel gain an Abandoned token.

triggers.name: Advance
triggers.text: Move this model 4" toward the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Maniacal Laughter
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy only. Once per turn. The target gains an Abandoned token.

triggers.name: The Gorgon's Cry
triggers.text: Another ally within 3" of the target declares an attack action, which receives a (+).

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Molly Squidpiddge' back='Molly Squidpidge'
